introSection: Mind Bender is a travelling steel wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently owned by US carnival operator Deggeller Attractions.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster first operated at Pedroland Park in Dillon, South Carolina, United States, from July 17, 2001 to 2002. It stood standing but not operating until 2011, when it was sold to Deggeller Attractions. It debuted at the York Fair in 2013.

fullText:
Mind Bender is a travelling steel wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer L&T Systems currently owned by US carnival operator Deggeller Attractions.

The roller coaster first operated at Pedroland Park in Dillon, South Carolina, United States, from July 17, 2001 to 2002. It stood standing but not operating until 2011, when it was sold to Deggeller Attractions. It debuted at the York Fair in 2013.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.
